message:
feat(store+command): DEBUG OBJECT hexpired_fields counter (br-frankenredis-25re, rv89 part 4d)

Extends DEBUG OBJECT with Redis 7.4's per-key hexpired_fields counter
exposing the cumulative count of per-field TTL reaps for the given
hash key's current incarnation.

- fr-store: new Store.hash_field_expired_counts BTreeMap<Vec<u8>, u64>.
- drop_hash_field_if_expired and drop_expired_hash_fields increment
  the counter per reaped field.
- hash_field_ttl_clear_for_key (invoked on whole-key eviction) removes
  the counter entry so a new incarnation of the same key name starts
  from zero — matches upstream.
- Store::hash_field_expired_count(key) -> u64 accessor.
- fr-command: DEBUG OBJECT appends `hexpired_fields:<n>` to its bulk
  reply (non-hash keys always report 0 since they never accumulate).

New test: debug_object_reports_hexpired_fields_counter — seeds a hash,
verifies hexpired_fields:0 before any reap, sets a past deadline, HGETs
the doomed field to trigger the lazy reap, verifies hexpired_fields:1
afterward. Existing debug_object_reports_live_metadata test uses
.contains() for field assertions so the new suffix is backward-compatible.

fr-command 626/0; fr-store 30/0 hash_field_ttl; workspace clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: cc-redis <noreply@anthropic.com>
